mapper.select: SELECT TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.IS_TOS, TDSI.ID, TDSI.SHIPVOYAGE_ID, TDSI.IMP_EXP, TDSI.TRADE_TYPE, TDSI.LOAD_UNLOAD, TDSI.VOYAGE, TDSI.COMPANY_ID, TDSI.COMPANY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_CODE, TDSI.CARGO_CATEGORY_NAME, TDSI.CARGO_NUM, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID, TDSI.CUSTOMER_NAME, TDSI.CONTACTS, TDSI.SHIP_PHONE, TDSI.PAYMENT_AMOUNT, TDSI.REMARK, TDSI.CREATE_BY, TDSI.CREATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.CREATE_TIME, TDSI.UPDATE_BY, TDSI.UPDATE_BY_NAME, TDSI.UPDATE_TIME, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_CODE, TDSI.SHIP_STATUS_NAME, TDSI.WORK_START_TIME, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME, TDSI.BO_HAI_TONG_ID, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NAME, TDSI.PRE_CHANGE_SHIP_NO, TDSI.CUSTOMER_ID_NEW, TDSI.IS_TOS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBCI.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId, jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT ID, TYPE, CARGO_INFO_ID, TRUST_ID, TRUST_CARGO_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ID, SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, SHIP_NAME, TRADE_TYPE, LOAD_UNLOAD, CARGO_OWNER_ID, CARGO_OWNER_NAME, CARGO_AGENT_ID, CARGO_AGENT_NAME, CARGO_CODE, CARGO_NAME, QUANTITY, TON, TICKET_NUM, STATEMENT_STATUS_CODE, STATEMENT_STATUS_NAME, REMARK, CREATE_BY, CREATE_BY_NAME, CREATE_TIME, UPDATE_BY, UPDATE_BY_NAME, UPDATE_TIME, VOYAGE, CONTRACT_ITEM_ID, CONTRACT_CODE, PRE_WEIGHT, VOLUME_TON FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST WHERE TYPE = '1' AND LOAD_UNLOAD = '卸' AND CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TEMP2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, TEMP2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM T_BUS_CARGO_INFO TBCI JOIN (SELECT TEMP.CARGO_INFO_ID, VWI.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM (SELECT TBTC.BUSINESS_NO, TBTC.CARGO_INFO_ID FROM T_BUS_TRUST_CARGO TBTC JOIN T_BUS_TRUST TBT ON TBTC.TRUST_ID = TBT.ID AND TBT.TYPE = '疏港') TEMP JOIN V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI ON VWI.IS_OLD = '否' AND TEMP.BUSINESS_NO = VWI.PLAN_NO UNION ALL SELECT TO_NUMBER(VWI2.CARGO_INFO_ID), VWI2.WEIGH_OUT_DT, VWI2.WEIGHT_GOODS FROM V_WEIGHT_INFO VWI2 WHERE VWI2.IS_OLD = '是' AND VWI2.PLAN_TYPE = '疏港') TEMP2 ON TBCI.ID = TEMP2.CARGO_INFO_ID WHERE TBCI.ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT}

SELECT TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID "shipvoyageItemId", SUM(TBH.TON) "ton", TDSI.WORK_END_TIME "workEndTime" FROM T_BUS_HANDOVERLIST TBH JOIN T_DIS_SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM TDSI ON TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID = TDSI.ID WHERE TBH.TYPE = '1' AND TBH.LOAD_UNLOAD = '装' AND TBH.CARGO_INFO_ID = #{cargoInfoId,jdbcType=BIGINT} GROUP BY TBH.SHIPVOYAGE_ITEM_ID, TDSI.WORK_END_TIME ORDER BY TDSI.WORK_END_TIME
